Author: Anomek
Name: AnoMech
Description:
Spawns fake party members and bosses client-side so you can practice raid mechanics without a full party.

This plugin is in beta and is unstable. You won't crash during your training sessions, but you will crash after it.

If you are doing any serious content: **RESTART YOUR GAME AFTER USING PLUGIN**. You **WILL CRASH** in the middle of pull.
Punchline: Another FFXIV mechanics simulator. Go to an inn and start practice. WARNING: restart game after practice
